https://www.all-clad.com/d5-stainless-po.description: Ideal for browning, searing, and frying foods like eggs, vegetables, and meats. The D5 Stainless Polished 12 inch frypans flat surface and flared side walls make it ideal for one hand sautéing and easy turning with a spatula.Built for professional kitchens & cherished by home cooks this heirloom cookware is Made in the USA with global components in our Pennsylvania Factory since 1971. As the inventor of bonded metal cookware, All-Clad continues to define trusted performance.Upgrade to D5® Stainless, built on the original 5-ply bonded technology invented by All-Clad. The steel core provides supremely even, steady heat for perfect braising and pan roasting, while the stainless steel surface creates a flawless sear.Elevated in both form and function, D5® Stainless features a highly polished stainless steel finish, flared edges for drip-free pouring, and generously sized, double-riveted stainless steel handles for a secure, confident grip.Built to outlast, each piece is precision engineered and third-party tested for safety—delivering performance you can trust. Backed by five decades of manufacturing expertise, All-Clad sets the standard for professional kitchen performance.Backed by our Limited Lifetime Warranty. Our cookware is oven & broiler safe up to 600°F and compatible with any stovetop, including induction. Handwashing is recommended.

https://www.bbqguys.com/i/2877456/all-cl.title: All-Clad D5 Stainless 12-Inch Fry Pan : BBQGuys
https://www.bbqguys.com/i/2877456/all-cl.description: Revolutionary cooking performance and exceptional design can be yours with the D5 collection of cookware from All-Clad. Finely crafted, five-ply construction features a stainless steel core layered between aluminum for exceptional heat distribution, warp resistance and stability. The interior cooking surface is made of high quality 18/10 stainless steel to deliver remarkable, reaction-free cooking results. The exterior is made of brushed stainless for a beautiful look that works on all cooktops, including induction. The cooking surface has a special sunburst finish for improved nonstick performance and a rolled lip for easy pouring. The cast stainless steel handle is well balanced and does not heat up with the pan, meaning you can comfortably and safely move the pan around while cooking. The All-Clad 12-Inch Fry Pan has the size laser etched on the bottom so you always know what size you have. Handcrafted in the USA, the D5 collection is the ideal cookware for the stylish home chef or culinary enthusiast with an eye for professional quality cookware. The D5 collection is safe for use in the dishwasher, in the freezer, under a broiler and in the oven up to 800 degrees Fahrenheit.
